ip_outcome_note: Visual match confirmed: yellow hexagonal cocoon with small side protrusions matches National Pokedex no. 14 exactly. PokemonTCG.io API xy12-6 confirms name, types, and artist.

trivia_bullets.text: Evolutions (XY12, November 2, 2016) is a Base Set tribute released for Pokemon's 20th anniversary. Nearly all cards reproduce 1999 Base Set artwork on modern card stock, with updated HP values, modern typing rules, and new EX/BREAK mechanics. Kakuna no. 6/108 is one of the retro prints. Artist is Keiji Kinebuchi, one of the original Base Set-era illustrators.
sources: WebSearch: Pokebeach XY12 Evolutions Base Set reprint overview

trivia_bullets.text: Kakuna (National Pokedex no. 14) can only learn Harden naturally in the mainline video games. The TCG card mirrors this: its two moves are Stiffen (reducing incoming damage by 40) and Poison Powder — defensive stasis and toxin-secretion, both accurate to the Beedrill line's biology.
"This Pokemon is in a temporary stage while making its body. It is almost completely unable to move on its own."

Art credited to Keiji Kinebuchi, one of the original Base Set-era Pokemon TCG illustrators active from the 1996 Japanese launch. His appearance in Evolutions is a deliberate callback to original-era talent.
